title: Port already in use
summary: Another process is already listening on that port.

explain.what: Another process is already listening on that port, so the app cannot bind to it.
why: A previous server instance is still running
Another application is using the same port
safe_options: Find the process using the port
Stop the process using its PID

warnings: Avoid using kill -9 unless the process does not respond

title: Permission denied
summary: The current user does not have enough permissions for that action, path, or port.

explain.what: The current user does not have enough permissions for that action, path, or port.
why: File or directory permissions are too restrictive
Trying to bind to a privileged port (<1024)
safe_options: Use a higher port, for example 3000
Adjust permissions or ownership if appropriate

title: File or path not found
summary: The system cannot find the file, directory, or command being referenced.

explain.what: The system cannot find the file, directory, or command being referenced.
why: The command is not available in PATH
safe_options: List the directory contents with ls
Check PATH or install the missing command

title: Connection refused
summary: A connection was attempted, but no service was listening on the target host and port.

explain.what: A connection was attempted, but no service was listening on the target host and port.
why: The target server is not running
safe_options: Confirm the host and port values

title: Module not found
summary: Node cannot resolve the module in an import or require statement.

explain.what: Node cannot resolve the module in an import or require statement.
why: There is an ESM/CommonJS or file extension mismatch
